meta.title: Flat Fee Rentals - Tidal Realty Services
meta.description: List your rental for a $399 flat fee in Houston. Full MLS exposure, tenant screening, background checks, lease preparation, and move-in coordination.

hero.description: Most property managers charge the equivalent of a full month's rent just to place a tenant. At Tidal Realty Services, we handle the entire tenant placement process for just $399. Full MLS exposure, thorough screening, and lease execution included.
hero.highlightText: entire tenant placement process for just $399

pullQuote: "The right tenant changes everything. We help you find them."

features.title: What you get
features.description: Our flat fee covers the full tenant placement process, from listing to lease signing.

items.title: MLS & HAR Listing
items.description: Your rental property gets listed on MLS and HAR with professional descriptions and broad syndication to major rental search platforms.

items.title: Rental Market Pricing Analysis
items.description: We analyze comparable rentals, local trends, and market conditions to position your property at the optimal rental price.

items.title: Tenant Screening & Background Checks
items.description: Every applicant goes through comprehensive background checks, credit reports, rental history verification, and income qualification.

items.title: Lease Preparation & Move-In
items.description: From lease drafting and execution to move-in coordination and property walkthrough, we handle every step.

comparison.title: Compare our fees
comparison.description: The standard rental commission is one full month's rent, split between the listing agent and the tenant's agent. Here's how our model compares.

traditional.title: The Traditional Model
traditional.description: Most listing agents charge half of the first month's rent to list your rental property.
traditional.summary: That's $1,000 paid just to list your rental.

tidal.title: The Tidal Model
tidal.description: We charge a flat $399 to list your rental. We still offer the standard 50% to the tenant's agent to ensure your property gets maximum exposure.

whyChooseUs.title: Why landlords choose us
whyChooseUs.description: Experienced investors trust us because we keep it simple and transparent.

items.title: Predictable Cost
items.description: Know exactly what you're paying upfront. No percentage of rent, no hidden fees.

items.title: Full MLS Exposure
items.description: Your property gets listed on MLS, HAR, and syndicated to major rental search platforms.

items.title: Thorough Screening
items.description: Every applicant goes through background checks, credit reports, and rental history verification.

cta.description: Let us handle the listing, marketing, and tenant screening so you can focus on what matters.
